sentences.en: Naidu stood at the arena entrance, her hands trembling slightly.
sentences.zh: 奈杜站在竞技场入口处,双手微微颤抖。

sentences.en: Emma Woods walked over and placed a gentle hand on her shoulder.
sentences.zh: 艾玛·伍兹走过来,轻轻把手放在她肩上。

sentences.en: "Stay confident," Emma encouraged. "Your lifelong dream is right here, go for it!"
sentences.zh: "保持自信,"艾玛鼓励道。"你毕生的梦想就在这里,加油!"

sentences.en: "I wonder if I am truly ready," Naidu whispered, her voice soft.
sentences.zh: "我不知道自己是否真的准备好了,"奈杜轻声说道。

sentences.en: "Pay attention to your spirit," Emma said warmly. "That is where your strength lives."
sentences.zh: "关注你的精神,"艾玛温暖地说。"你的力量就在那里。"

sentences.en: Emily Dyer stepped out of the crowd, smiling brightly at her friend.
sentences.zh: 艾米莉·戴尔从人群中走出来,灿烂地微笑着看向她的朋友。

sentences.en: "Success belongs to those who believe," Emily added softly.
sentences.zh: "成功属于那些相信自己的人,"艾米莉轻声补充道。

sentences.en: Naidu felt warmth spread through her chest as their words sank in.
sentences.zh: 奈杜感到一股暖流在胸口蔓延,他们的话语渐渐渗入心田。

sentences.en: She stepped onto the field, ready to chase her dream with all her heart.
sentences.zh: 她踏上场地,准备全力以赴追逐自己的梦想。
